items.summary: Add a 'Pregnant Women' data model to the backend with fields: name, age, husband name, address, phone number, last menstrual period (LMP) date, expected delivery date (EDD), gestational age (weeks), weight, hemoglobin level, blood pressure, trimester, risk level (normal/moderate/high), and visit history (array of dated records with weight, BP, hemoglobin, and notes).
Add a 'Pregnant Women' tab to the main navigation (both the desktop tab bar in Layout.tsx and the mobile BottomNavigation.tsx), alongside the existing Dashboard, Growth, Attendance, and Parent tabs.

Create a PregnantWomenPage that displays: (1) a summary section showing total registered pregnant women, count by trimester (1st/2nd/3rd), and count by risk level (normal/moderate/high); (2) a searchable, filterable list of registered pregnant women cards; (3) a form to register a new pregnant woman or record a new visit.

Create a PregnantWomanCard component that displays: woman's name, age, gestational age in weeks, trimester badge, risk level badge (color-coded: green for normal, yellow for moderate, red for high), EDD, last visit date, and an expand toggle to show visit history and latest vitals (weight, BP, hemoglobin).

Add dummy/seed data for at least 5 pregnant women across different trimesters and risk levels in a new utility file (frontend/src/utils/pregnantWomenData.ts), following the same pattern as dummyData.ts.

Add gestational age calculation and trimester classification utilities in frontend/src/utils/gestationalCalculations.ts: given an LMP date, calculate gestational age in weeks, determine trimester (1st: 1–13 weeks, 2nd: 14–26 weeks, 3rd: 27+ weeks), and compute EDD (LMP + 280 days).
